pre_game.message: Hey, I'm F. This room's a bit crowded, but I'm trying to keep my head on straight before things kick off. What brings you to a game like this?
Nice to meet you, F. I'm E. Honestly, I'm just here for the prize money; I've got people back home I really want to help out. What about you?
Same here. I’ve got people counting on me, so I’m really focused on winning this for them. It’s a big motivator when it’s not just about yourself, isn't it?
Absolutely. It adds a lot of pressure, but it also gives you a reason to play smart and stay focused.
For sure. It’s a lot easier to stay sharp when you know exactly what’s at stake. Have you heard anything about what the first round might be?
Honestly, I’m completely in the dark. Just trying to stay alert and ready for whatever they throw at us. You?
Same here, I've got no idea what's coming, so I'm just trying to stay calm and keep my eyes open.
Smart move. No point stressing over what we can't control yet. We just have to be ready when it starts.
Exactly. Just have to take it as it comes. It's good to meet someone with their priorities straight.
Likewise. Let's see what happens. Good luck out there.
Thanks, E. Good luck to you too—let's hope we both make it through.

post_game.message: I took $10,000 because it was the fair share, and I'm really glad we all coordinated to ensure everyone got the same amount.
I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
I agree, it’s a great outcome for everyone.
